top_signals.title: An AI trade involving energy and infrastructure that's doubled your money, topping Nvidia
top_signals.summary: If you put the same money into a basket of companies that are building out AI infrastructure and energy sources, you’ve done much better than stocks like Nvidia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
